arts.ttl: Armando Broja on ‘fast-track’ to make Everton debut after long-term injury
arts.sum: Sean Dyche says 23-year-old has had ‘really strong week’ Manager says transfer budget limited by stalled sale Sean Dyche is hopeful Armando Broja is close to his Everton debut, with the club hoping to fast-track the on-loan Chelsea forward’s return from injury. Broja joined Everton late on deadline day but has not played since an achilles injury in pre-season that scuppered a proposed move to Ipswich. The 23-year-old remains unavailable for Saturday’s home game against Brentford but could feature in matches for the under-21s as he rebuilds fitness. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Barcelona give Chelsea and Man Utd edge in David transfer
arts.sum: The likes of Manchester United and Chelsea have been given a boost in the race to sign Jonathan David on a free transfer next summer. The hesitation by Barca over David could open the door for United and Chelsea, who have both held a long-term interest in the player and are likely to try for his signature when he is able to freely negotiate with clubs in January.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Cole Palmer's blunt three-word response to Amelia Dimoldenberg proposal
arts.sum: Dimoldenberg goes on to question whether Palmer would rather be subbed in the first-half or score an own goal. The Chicken Shop Date presenter then asks whether the Chelsea ace would rather score from the halfway line or with a bicycle kick.

arts.ttl: Reece James Chelsea injury record in full and contract situation as latest setback confirmed
arts.sum: Chelsea captain Reece James has suffered yet another injury setback to rule him out of this weekend's Premier League clash with Leicester City. The following season, he missed nine games, with the first hamstring problem coming in December 2020.

arts.ttl: Paperwork confirms PSR-busting £98m Chelsea deal will go through in early January

Steve Cooper has kept Leicester above the drop zone so far despite inheriting a restless dressing room... beating his predecessor Enzo Maresca would be huge for his long-term Foxes future, writes TOM COLLOMOSSE
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Steve Cooper and Enzo Maresca will be in opposite dugouts on Saturday but both know the toughest challenge facing any Leicester boss - to tame a restless camp.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Leicester - Premier League
arts.sum: How Chelsea could line up for their Premier League clash with Leicester on Saturday.

arts.ttl: 'The impact': Leicester manager Steve Cooper admits Chelsea player is a 'threat' in Saturday's match
arts.sum: Chelsea return after the international break with a trip to Leicester City this weekend, and they do so with plenty of attacking firepower at their...

arts.ttl: Reece James Injury: Progress & Potential Return Date for Chelsea Defender
arts.sum: Chelsea's captain, Reece James suffered another injury setback and wont feature in the Premier League clash against Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer injury latest with training hint and Enzo Maresca update before Leicester
arts.sum: Chelsea return to Premier League action this weekend, but head coach Enzo Maresca has an injury concern over key man Cole Palmer . Despite playing the full 90 minutes against Arsenal, the Chelsea man withdrew due to a knee injury he suffered in the draw against Manchester United in the previous match.
